title: Synthetic Governance Brief
summary: Public-safe brief for a synthetic organization governance program.

title: Civic Platform Organization
summary: Synthetic organization used to test organization-scale Mirai Graph governance.

title: Trustworthy Service
summary: Provide dependable services while keeping decisions auditable.

title: Evidence-Led Operations
summary: Promote operational changes only when evidence, decision rights and controls are recorded.

title: Delivery Department
summary: Department responsible for bounded implementation batches.

title: Service Quality Program
summary: Cross-department program to improve service reliability and evidence coverage.

title: Reduce False Progress
summary: Reduce claims that planned or ready work has already been executed.

title: Evidence Before Promotion
summary: A proposal cannot be promoted without evidence and decision-right review.

title: Portfolio Owner Decision Right
summary: Portfolio owner approves changes that affect cross-department priorities.

title: Policy Bypass
summary: A team may treat generated context or feedback as authorization.

title: Governance Review
summary: Review control checks decision rights, evidence and risk before promotion.

title: Evidence Coverage
summary: Share of promoted decisions with linked evidence.

title: Review Feedback
summary: Review feedback can create a proposal but cannot update canonical graph state.

title: Tighten Promotion Gate
summary: Improve the promotion gate when review finds missing evidence or decision rights.

title: Promotion Review Gate
summary: Gate before a proposal becomes an approved organizational change.
